description.name: ARCAD DDG
description.part1: specializes in professional diamond drilling and cutting in concrete and reinforced concrete structures.
description.part2: Our services are provided in Poland and across many European countries, delivering advanced solutions for the construction and industrial sectors.
description.part3: For more than four years we have cooperated with Westinghouse on projects related to dismantling nuclear reactor components.
description.part4: Our work includes precision underwater cutting in reactor pools at depths of approximately 25 meters, performed together with an international team of specialists.
description.part6: Poland, Germany, Sweden, Finland, Austria, South Africa. Nuclear power plant projects: KKU Unterweser, KKI Isar, KKB Biblis (Germany) and BKW (Switzerland).

offerText.text2: Cutting in concrete / reinforced concrete structures using the diamond cutting method
